summary: Completed testing of Finde R Room Rental Marketplace focusing on Post Room wizard button visibility fix. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend core features working, but authentication flow preventing complete Post Room wizard testing.

integration_issues.issue: OTP verification failing with 400 error preventing access to Post Room wizard

design_issues.issue: Favorites and Profile routes not redirecting to login as expected

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix OTP authentication flow - OTP verification API returning 400 error preventing access to Post Room wizard. The button visibility fix appears to be correctly implemented in code (pb-44 padding, bottom-20 positioning) but cannot be fully verified due to authentication blocking access to /post route.
